overview: Grottox is a Normal-class Construct/Undead monster found in Ruins. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 600 HP, 22 physical damage, 120 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Slash Attack R at 150% ratio (330 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Slash Attack R (150%), Slash Attack L (150%), Slash Attack R Combo (150%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Earth (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
